title: Vanilla-like Apple Hunger
description: Vanilla-like, by using colors from other elements and the programmer art apple texture for a vanilla feel.
body: An entry for the HUD Jam (Hosted on PlanetMinecraft), swapping the well-known hunger bar texture to use apples instead! I tried my best to give a vanilla look, by using the programmer art apple texture (& the small variant in Legend of the Chambered) and the colors from the heart texture. Should work in all versions, 1.20.1 & 1.20.2! Hope you like it!
